# Benchmark Gap Comparison

## Benchmark table

| Reference | Observable | Main finite-c statement | Status in this workspace |
| --------- | ---------- | ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| arXiv:1307.6562 | modular-invariance gap bounds | Foundational linear-functional constraint | Registered as `R-01-foundation` |
| arXiv:1608.06241 | `Delta_gap` near `c = 1` | `Delta_gap <= c/6 + 1/3` benchmark bound | Registered and marked verified as `R-02-gap-bound` |
| arXiv:2308.08725 | integrality-improved gap | Slight numerical strengthening near `c = 1`; not a new closed-form bound | Registered as `R-03-integrality` |
| arXiv:2308.11692 | geometric threshold window | `(c-1)/12 < Delta_gap^* < c/12` | Registered as `R-04-geometry` |
| arXiv:2604.01275 | ML candidate window | Candidate truncated spectra for `1 < c <= 8/7` | Registered as `R-05-ml-window` |

## Reading rule

- `R-02-gap-bound` is a benchmark.
- `R-03-integrality` and `R-04-geometry` are strengthening and interpretation layers.
- `R-05-ml-window` is a candidate-spectrum regime, not a proof of new exact finite-c theories.
